message:
Command `# Look for nc_socgen verify
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
find /nc -name "verify.py" -o -name "verification.py" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
find /nc -name "nc_verify*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
find /usr/local/bin /usr/bin -name "nc_*" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
pip show nc-chipgen 2>/dev/null || pip3 show nc-chipgen 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Look for nc_socgen verify
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
find /nc -name "verify.py" -o -name "verification.py" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
find /nc -name "nc_verify*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
find /usr/local/bin /usr/bin -name "nc_*" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
pip show nc-chipgen 2>/dev/null || pip3 show nc-chipgen 2>/dev/null"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# Look for nc_socgen verify
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
find /nc -name "verify.py" -o -name "verification.py" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
find /nc -name "nc_verify*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
find /usr/local/bin /usr/bin -name "nc_*" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
pip show nc-chipgen 2>/dev/null || pip3 show nc-chipgen 2>/dev/null
